preamble: The shift from the voiceless bilabial fricative [ɸ] to the voiced labiodental fricative [v] involves both voicing and a change in the place of articulation (fronting).

examples.note: Systemic alternations between bilabial and labiodental fricatives.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
